articles.title: SNP ‘first refusal’ housing proposal comes under fire
articles.summary:
A proposal by Scottish First Minister, SNP leader John Swinney, to give private renters ‘first refusal’ to buy their homes, has come under fire from a property policy expert.

articles.title: Fleet Mortgages launches new BTL 2-year tracker
articles.summary:
Fleet Mortgages, the buy-to-let specialist lender, has today (10th April 2026) announced the launch of three new 75% LTV two-year tracker products available within its three buy-to-let lending ranges: Standard, Limited Company and HMO/Multi-Unit Freehold Block (MUFB).
